content: No scrollettes at the moment, please. And funny, you should use the word archive. We were just talking about archiving individual threads, and you suggested I could scroll to the bottom of the toolbar, as you will, on the left side of the screen on the iPad, and I would see an archive option. However, I got to the bottom and didn't, but I realized how many, many, many threads we have developed over the last few months, and it seems to me archiving all of them, which is what I intended to do, is going to be a tedious process.
